query_normalized: statistical analysis of publicly available climate model output ensembles statistics
rationale: This paper addresses the user's question by providing a specific statistical methodology (conditional diffusion models) for processing and analyzing Earth system model (ESM) output ensembles, specifically focusing on bias correction and downscaling of precipitation data.
